title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・再始動

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki wins the autumn Tenno Sho in a
stunning victory and gives the audience a show to
remember, just like she promised.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's even more excited than usual after the race.
It seems she's finally grasped something
important as an entertainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Next up is the Arima Kinen. Her show is finally
nearing its climax...
